projects.description: A scalable healthcare platform designed to manage hospital workflows including OP consultation, pharmacy, lab, and administration.
responsibilities: Designed and developed key modules: OP Consultation Workflow, Pharmacy, Lab, and Admin
Built scalable backend APIs using NestJS with GraphQL in a multi-server (microservices-style) architecture
Developed responsive and dynamic user interfaces using Angular
Collaborated with clients and stakeholders to gather requirements and define workflows
Led and mentored team members, guiding architecture and managing task execution
Optimized application performance, improving response times and system efficiency

devOpsAndCloud.ciCd: Wrote and maintained GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines
devOpsAndCloud.containerization: Created and optimized Dockerfiles for containerized deployments
devOpsAndCloud.infrastructureAsCode: Developed Terraform scripts for infrastructure provisioning

observability: Set up alerts for system reliability
optimizations: Performed cost optimization on cloud resources

projects.projectName: Smart Reports – Digital Patient Reporting System
projects.description: A digital healthcare reporting platform that presents patient data in a clear, visual, and user-friendly format using metrics, color indicators, and organ-based representations.
responsibilities: Developed a digital reporting system to display complete patient health data in an intuitive format
Designed reports with visual metrics and color indicators for normal, abnormal, and critical conditions
Built body/organ-based representations for better understanding of patient conditions
Developed a responsive and high-performance web application using Next.js and Tailwind CSS
Integrated WhatsApp report sharing using Twilio by sending secure report URLs
Implemented PDF generation using Puppeteer for downloadable reports
Optimized application performance for faster loading times
Managed report data using MongoDB and Azure Storage

devOpsAndCloud.ciCd: Created and maintained GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines
devOpsAndCloud.containerization: Worked with containerized deployments where required
devOpsAndCloud.cloud: Managed application deployment and services on Microsoft Azure

observability: Ensured application stability with logging and monitoring practices
optimizations: Improved performance and reduced loading time
Enhanced user experience with responsive and efficient UI design
